issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The card text specifies: (1) look at up to 5 cards from top of deck, (2) reveal up to 1 red Character with cost 1, (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. The DSL only captures the search without the 5-card limit, color filter (red), card type filter (Character), or the instruction to place remaining cards at bottom.
Filter missing required constraints: no color filter for 'red', no card type filter for 'Character', and no limit on cards examined (should examine top 5 only).
